notes: Market-neutral XTI/XNG momentum plus idiosyncratic-volatility double screen. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX D1 host setfile. It builds an equal-weight XTI/XNG/XAU/XAG D1 commodity factor, ranks only XTI and XNG by three-month momentum and OLS residual volatility, and trades only when the momentum winner is the lower-IVol energy leg. XAU and XAG are read-only factor members. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not standalone legs.
